rules.name: PWR: Gas
rules.rule: g_sharc_trig_power: if(((g_htr_esel == 0) && (g_htr_mdl == 1 || g_htr_mdl == 2 || g_htr_mdl == 3 || g_htr_mdl == 4 || g_htr_mdl == 5 || g_htr_mdl == 6)), g_pwr_gs = 1)

rules.name: PWR: Electricity
rules.rule: g_sharc_trig_power: if(((g_htr_esel == 3 || g_htr_esel == 4) && (g_htr_mdl == 3 || g_htr_mdl == 4 || g_htr_mdl == 6 || g_htr_mdl == 10 || g_htr_mdl == 11 || g_htr_mdl == 13 || g_htr_mdl == 14)), g_pwr_el = 1)

rules.name: PWR: Gas + Electricity
rules.rule: g_sharc_trig_power: if(((g_htr_esel == 1 || g_htr_esel == 2) && (g_htr_mdl == 3 || g_htr_mdl == 4 || g_htr_mdl == 6)), g_pwr_gas_el = 1)

rules.name: PWR: Fuse
rules.rule: g_sharc_trig_fuse: g_fuse_ok = (g_htr_fuse == 0) || ((g_htr_esel == 1 || g_htr_esel == 3) && (g_htr_fuse == 2 || g_htr_fuse == 3 || g_htr_fuse == 4)) || ((g_htr_esel == 2 || g_htr_esel == 4) && (g_htr_fuse == 3 || g_htr_fuse == 4))

rules.name: PWR: Power source set
rules.rule: g_pwr_gs, g_pwr_el, g_pwr_gas_el, mask=['or'] : if(g_pwr_el == 1 || g_pwr_gas_el == 1 || g_pwr_gs == 1, g_pwr_source_check = 1)

rules.name: PWR: Power source set error
rules.rule: g_pwr_gs, g_pwr_el, g_pwr_gas_el, mask=['or'] : if(g_pwr_el == 0 && g_pwr_gas_el == 0 && g_pwr_gs == 0, g_pwr_source_check = 0, g_cc0error = 1, g_system_off = 1)

rules.name: AC connected
rules.rule: g_ac_check, g_sharc_trig_ac, mask=['or']: if(g_el_source && g_htr_ac, g_ac_valid = 1, g_fuse_check = 1)

rules.name: AC connected error
rules.rule: g_ac_check, g_sharc_trig_ac, mask=['or']: if(g_el_source && !g_htr_ac, g_ac_valid = 0, g_cc0error = 2, g_system_off = 1)

rules.name: Fuse check
rules.rule: g_fuse_check, g_fuse_ok, mask=['or']: if(g_el_source && g_fuse_ok, g_fuse_valid = 1)

rules.name: Fuse check error
rules.rule: g_fuse_check, g_fuse_ok, mask=['or']: if(g_el_source && !g_fuse_ok, g_fuse_valid = 0, g_cc0error = 3, g_system_off = 1)

rules.name: Electircal source validation
rules.rule: g_ac_valid, g_fuse_valid, mask=['or']: g_el_src_valid = g_ac_valid && g_fuse_valid

rules.name: Turn on el source
rules.rule: g_gas_src_valid, g_el_src_valid, mask=['or']: g_turn_on_el = (g_pwr_el && g_el_src_valid) || (g_pwr_gas_el && (g_el_src_valid && g_gas_src_valid))

rules.name: Turn on gas source
rules.rule: g_gas_src_valid, g_el_src_valid, mask=['or']: g_turn_on_gas = (g_pwr_gs && g_gas_src_valid) || (g_pwr_gas_el && (g_el_src_valid && g_gas_src_valid))

rules.name: Power on HTR source
rules.rule: g_turn_on_el, g_turn_on_gas, mask=['or']: g_power_htr_on = g_turn_on_el || g_turn_on_gas

rules.name: Init status boiler
rules.rule: g_htr_boiler, g_status = -1, g_init_status = 0: if(g_status == -1 && g_power_htr_on == 1, g_status = g_htr_boiler, g_init_status = 1)

rules.name: Boiler Save Status
rules.rule: g_power_htr_on: if(g_init_status && g_power_htr_on == 0 && g_set_by_elec == 0, g_status = g_heater_boiler_status = g_htr_boiler)

rules.name: Boiler Power On
rules.rule: g_power_htr_on: if(g_init_status && g_status && g_power_htr_on == 1 && g_set_by_elec == 1, g_htr_boiler = g_heater_boiler_status = g_status, g_toggle_boiler = 1)

rules.name: Boiler param on
rules.rule: g_trig_param_on_off: if(g_htr_boiler && g_power_htr_on, g_toggle_boiler = 1, g_heater_boiler_status = g_htr_boiler)

rules.name: Turn on process
rules.rule: g_is_act, g_spcy, g_stemp, g_shumid, mask=['or']: if(g_is_act, g_turn_on_process = 1)

rules.name: Start Heating/Cooling
rules.rule: g_turn_on_process: if(g_spcy == 0, g_start_heat_cool = 1, g_reset_hc = 1, g_reset_aiq = 1, g_reset_humid = 1)

rules.name: Start Air Quality
rules.rule: g_turn_on_process: if(g_spcy == 1, g_start_aiq = 1, g_reset_hc = 1, g_reset_aiq = 1, g_reset_humid = 1)

rules.name: Start Humidity
rules.rule: g_turn_on_process: if(g_spcy == 4, g_start_humid = 1, g_reset_hc = 1, g_reset_aiq = 1, g_reset_humid = 1)

rules.name: Turn off process
rules.rule: g_is_act: if(!g_is_act, g_reset_humid = g_reset_aiq = g_reset_hc = 1, g_sharc_turn_off = g_shape_turn_off = g_iv_turn_off = 1)

rules.name: Reset heating/cooling status
rules.rule: g_reset_hc: g_save_state = g_process_maintain = g_heat_env_on = g_heat_dev_on = g_cool_env_on = g_cool_dev_on = 0, g_hc_timer_off = 1

rules.comment: Control sharc processes depending on power source
rules.name: Sharc turn off
Heat env
rules.rule: g_start_heat_cool: g_heating_env = (g_stemp > g_itemp) && (g_itemp < g_otemp && g_stemp <= g_otemp)

rules.name: Cool env
rules.rule: g_start_heat_cool: g_cooling_env = (g_stemp < g_itemp) && (g_itemp > g_otemp && g_stemp >= g_otemp)

rules.name: SHARC: Heat by environment
rules.rule: g_heating_env, g_cont_heat_env, mask=['or']: g_sharc_heat_env = (g_power_htr_on == 1) && (g_heating_env == 1), if (g_sharc_heat_env, pub(htr0aon=1, htr0amd=2, htr0vminfan=1))

rules.name: SHAPE: Heat by environment
rules.rule: g_heating_env: g_shape_heat_env = (g_is_shape_avl == 1) && (g_heating_env == 1), if (g_shape_heat_env, pub(ac0on=1, ac0md=2, ac0fspd=1))

rules.name: SHARC: Heat by device
rules.rule: g_heating_dev, g_cont_heat_dev, mask=['or']: g_sharc_heat_dev = (g_power_htr_on == 1) && (g_heating_dev == 1), if (g_sharc_heat_dev, pub(htr0aon=1, htr0amd=0, htr0vminfan=1))

rules.name: SHAPE: Heat by device
rules.rule: g_heating_dev: g_shape_heat_dev = (g_is_shape_avl == 1) && (ac0hfavl == 1) && (g_heating_dev == 1), if (g_shape_heat_dev, pub(ac0on=1, ac0md=1, ac0fspd=1))

rules.name: SHARC: Cool by environment
rules.rule: g_cooling_env, g_cont_cool_env, mask=['or']: g_sharc_cool_env = (g_power_htr_on == 1) && (g_cooling_env == 1), if (g_sharc_cool_env, pub(htr0aon=1, htr0amd=2, htr0vminfan=1))

rules.name: SHAPE: Cool by environment
rules.rule: g_cooling_env: g_shape_cool_env = (g_is_shape_avl == 1) && (g_cooling_env == 1), if (g_shape_cool_env, pub(ac0on=1, ac0md=2, ac0fspd=1))

rules.name: SHARC: Cool by device
rules.rule: g_cooling_dev, g_cont_cool_dev, mask=['or']: g_sharc_cool_dev = (g_power_htr_on == 1) && (g_cooling_dev == 1), if (g_sharc_cool_dev, pub(htr0aon=1, htr0amd=2, htr0vminfan=1))

rules.name: SHAPE: Cool by device
rules.rule: g_cooling_dev: g_shape_cool_dev = (g_is_shape_avl == 1) && (g_cooling_dev == 1), if (g_shape_cool_dev, pub(ac0on=1, ac0md=0, ac0fspd=1))

rules.name: Heating env on
rules.rule: g_heating_env: if(g_sharc_heat_env || g_shape_heat_env || g_iv_heat_env, g_save_state = g_heat_env_on = 1, g_heat_dev_on = 0, g_cool_env_on = 0, g_cool_dev_on = 0)

rules.name: Heating dev on
rules.rule: g_heating_dev: if(g_sharc_heat_dev || g_shape_heat_dev || g_iv_heat_dev, g_heat_env_on = 0, g_save_state = g_heat_dev_on = 2, g_cool_env_on = 0, g_cool_dev_on = 0)

rules.name: Cooling env on
rules.rule: g_cooling_env: if(g_sharc_cool_env || g_shape_cool_env || g_iv_cool_env, g_heat_env_on = 0, g_heat_dev_on = 0, g_save_state = g_cool_env_on = 3, g_cool_dev_on = 0)

rules.name: Cooling dev on
rules.rule: g_cooling_dev: if(g_sharc_cool_dev || g_shape_cool_dev || g_iv_cool_dev, g_heat_env_on = 0, g_heat_dev_on = 0, g_cool_env_on = 0, g_save_state = g_cool_dev_on = 4)

rules.name: Heating process
rules.rule: g_itemp: if(!g_process_maintain && ((g_heat_env_on || g_heat_dev_on) && (g_stemp <= g_itemp)), g_save_state = g_process_maintain = g_heat_maintain = 5)

rules.name: Cooling process
rules.rule: g_itemp: if(!g_process_maintain && ((g_cool_env_on || g_cool_dev_on) && (g_stemp >= g_itemp)), g_save_state = g_process_maintain = g_cool_maintain = 6)

rules.name: Heating maintain
rules.rule: g_heat_maintain: if(g_power_htr_on, pub(htr0aon = 1, htr0amd = 0, htr0vminfan = 0)), g_shape_turn_off = 1, g_iv_turn_off = 1

rules.name: Cooling maintain
rules.rule: g_cool_maintain: if(g_is_shape_avl, pub(ac0on = 1, ac0md = 3, ac0fspd = 0)), g_sharc_turn_off = 1, g_iv_turn_off = 1

rules.name: Turn off env-dev timer
rules.rule: g_heat_maintain, g_cool_maintain, g_hc_timer_off, mask=['or']: if(g_timer_on, timer_off(g_timer_on))

rules.name: Air Quality SHARC
rules.rule: g_aiq_process, g_cont_aiq,mask=['or']: pub((g_aiq_process == 1) && (g_power_htr_on == 1), htr0aon=1, htr0amd=2, htr0vminfan=1)

rules.name: AIQ process
rules.rule: g_voc: if((g_aiq_process == 1) && (g_set_voc > g_voc), g_aiq_process = 0, g_aiq_maintain = 1, g_save_aiq_state = 2)

rules.name: AIQ maintain process
rules.rule: g_aiq_maintain, g_cont_maintain_aiq,mask=['or']: if(g_is_iv_avl, pub(iv0pwron = 1, iv0mode = 1)), g_sharc_turn_off = g_shape_turn_off = 1

rules.name: Humidity SHARC
rules.rule: g_hmd_process, g_cont_humid,mask=['or']: pub((g_hmd_process == 1) && (g_power_htr_on == 1), htr0aon=1, htr0amd=2, htr0vminfan=1)

rules.name: Humidity process
rules.rule: g_ihumid: if((g_hmd_process == 1) && (g_shumid > g_ihumid), g_hmd_process = 0, g_humid_maintain = 1, g_save_humid_state = 2)
